task_description: Add Australian English as a preferred language with selected language features and set the regional format to Australian English.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a Windows Settings category tile with a blue icon containing a clock and the character 'A', labeled '时间和语言', with smaller text '语言、区域、日期'. A semitransparent red X is centered directly on this tile, indicating the exact click target. In the full-screen view, this tile appears in the main Windows 设置 home page among other categories such as 系统, 设备, 手机, 网络和 Internet, 个性化, 应用, 帐户, 游戏, 轻松使用, 搜索, 隐私, and 更新和安全.
caption.think: The user intends to open the Time & Language settings category from the Windows Settings home screen.
caption.expectation: The Time & Language settings page should open, showing options related to language, region, date, and time.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the left navigation pane of Windows Settings under the 时间和语言 section. A semitransparent red X is centered on the item labeled '语言', which has a small icon showing the character 'A' and another language character. This is a UI control in the sidebar navigation, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, the current page is '日期和时间', and the left sidebar lists '日期和时间', '区域', '语言', and '语音', with '语言' positioned between '区域' and '语音'.
caption.think: The user wants to switch from the Date & Time page to the Language settings page within Time & Language.
caption.action: Click the '语言' navigation item in the left sidebar.
caption.expectation: The Language settings page should open, and the main content area should update to language-related options while the '语言' item becomes selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Preferred languages section of Windows Settings. A semitransparent red X is centered on the '添加语言' control next to a square button with a plus sign, indicating the exact target is this add-language button area. This is a UI control in the main content panel, not a blank region. In the full-screen view, the Windows 设置 app is open to 时间和语言 > 语言, with '语言' selected in the left sidebar and the '首选语言' section listing '中文(简体，中国)' below the add button.
caption.think: The user likely wants to add another preferred language from the Language settings page.
caption.action: Click the '添加语言' button in the '首选语言' section.
caption.expectation: An add-language picker or dialog should open, allowing selection of a language to install or add to the preferred languages list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Windows language selection dialog titled '选择要安装的语言'. At the top is an active search text box with a blue outline, and the text 'englis' is currently entered inside it, indicating typing into the language search field. Below the box, the filtered results list includes entries such as 'English (United Arab Emirates)', 'English (Ireland)', 'English (Australia)', 'English (Belize)', and 'English (Philippines)'. In the full-screen view, this dialog is open over Windows 设置 on 时间和语言 > 语言, where the user previously chose to add a language; the rest of the settings page is dimmed behind the modal.
caption.think: The user is searching for English in the add-language dialog, and the typed text is refining the results toward the English language options rather than selecting one yet.
caption.action: Type 'ENGLISH' into the active language search box, continuing/replacing the current search text so the field reads 'english'.
caption.expectation: The search results should update to English language entries, making the relevant English option easier to select next.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the list row labeled 'English (Australia)', with the Chinese subtitle '英语(澳大利亚)' beneath it. The row is highlighted in gray, indicating it is the exact selectable item under the X. This is a UI control in a list, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, a modal dialog titled '选择要安装的语言' is open over Windows Settings > 时间和语言 > 语言. The search box at the top contains 'english', and the results list includes multiple English variants such as 'English (United Arab Emirates)', 'English (Ireland)', 'English (Australia)', and 'English (Belize)'.
caption.think: The user has filtered the language list to English options and now wants to select the Australian English language entry to proceed with adding that language.
caption.expectation: The 'English (Australia)' option should become selected, and the dialog should update its selection state so the user can proceed to the next step, typically enabling or preparing the next action.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled '下一页' at the bottom of the language selection dialog. This is a UI control button, not a blank area. Above it are option tiles such as '语音识别' and '手写'. In the full-screen view, the modal dialog titled '选择要安装的语言' is open over Windows 设置 > 时间和语言 > 语言, the search box contains 'english', and 'English (Australia)' is highlighted in blue in the results list.
caption.think: The user has already selected English (Australia) and now wants to proceed to the next stage of adding or installing that language.
caption.expectation: The dialog should advance to the next step, opening the next configuration page for installing or adding English (Australia).

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the checkbox row labeled '文本到语音转换 (23 MB)', next to a blue speech-style icon. The checkbox at the far left of this row is already checked, and this is a UI control in the installation options list, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, the Windows 设置 > 语言 page is dimmed behind the modal panel titled '安装语言功能'. The selected language is 'English (Australia)', and several optional language features are listed, including '安装语言包', '设置为我的 Windows 显示语言', '文本到语音转换', '语音识别', and '手写'.
caption.think: The user is configuring which optional features to install for English (Australia) and is clicking the '文本到语音转换' option row to change or confirm its selection state.
caption.action: Click the '文本到语音转换 (23 MB)' checkbox row.
caption.expectation: The text-to-speech option should toggle or become the active selected row, updating its checkbox state immediately within the language features list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the left side of the row labeled '手写 (6 MB)', next to a small blue pencil-in-a-square handwriting icon. The checkbox at the far left of this row is already checked, so the X is targeting this handwriting option row within the install-features list. In the full-screen view, a modal dialog titled '安装语言功能' is open over the Windows Settings language page for 'English (Australia)'. Other optional features listed include '安装语言包', '设置为我的 Windows 显示语言', '文本到语音转换 (23 MB)', and '语音识别 (4 MB)'.
caption.think: The user is continuing to choose optional language features and intends to click the already-selected '手写 (6 MB)' handwriting feature, likely to toggle or confirm that selection before installing.
caption.action: Click the '手写 (6 MB)' checkbox row.
caption.expectation: The handwriting feature row should immediately toggle or become the active selected item, updating its checkbox state within the dialog.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled '安装' at the bottom of the dialog. Just above it is the blue link '选择其他语言'. In the full-screen view, a modal dialog titled '安装语言功能' is open over Windows Settings > 语言. The selected language is 'English (Australia)', and optional features such as '安装语言包', '设置为我的 Windows 显示语言', '文本到语音转换 (23 MB)', '语音识别 (4 MB)', and '手写 (6 MB)' are listed. The target is a UI control button in the dialog’s bottom area.
caption.think: The user has finished choosing the language features for English (Australia) and now wants to confirm and begin installing the selected language components.
caption.expectation: The install command should be triggered immediately, and the dialog should close or transition to a progress state while Windows begins installing the selected language features.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tile labeled '区域格式', with the smaller text '中文(简体，中国)' beneath it and a blue globe-like region icon above it. This is a clickable settings tile, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, Windows 设置 is open to the '语言' page. Across the top section are tiles for 'Windows 显示', '应用和网站', '区域格式', '键盘', and '语音'. The X is on the '区域格式' tile in that top grid.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the regional format settings for the current language configuration, continuing language and locale setup after installing features.
caption.expectation: The regional format settings should open or expand, showing options related to country/region and format preferences.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on a blue highlighted drop-down field with a downward-pointing chevron at the right edge. In the full-screen view, Windows 设置 is on the '区域' page. The targeted control is the '区域格式' drop-down, currently showing '推荐 [中文(简体，中国)]' beneath the text indicating the current format is '中文(简体，中国)'. This is a UI control in the main settings content area, not a blank region.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the regional format selection list so they can choose a different date, time, and locale formatting preset.
caption.action: Click the '区域格式' drop-down currently showing '推荐 [中文(简体，中国)]'.
caption.expectation: The drop-down list should open immediately, displaying available regional format options for selection.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the list item labeled '英语(澳大利亚)' inside an open drop-down menu. The row is highlighted in gray, indicating it is the exact selectable option under the pointer. In the full-screen view, Windows 设置 is open on the '区域' page, and the '区域格式' drop-down list is expanded with multiple English regional variants. This target is a UI control option within the opened menu, not a blank area.
caption.think: The user likely wants to choose English (Australia) as the regional format from the expanded '区域格式' list.
caption.action: Click the '英语(澳大利亚)' option in the open '区域格式' drop-down list.
caption.expectation: That option should become selected as the regional format, and the drop-down menu should close, updating the field to show '英语(澳大利亚)'.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Settings window rather than a tightly targeted control, with no semitransparent red X, which indicates a scroll action. In the main content area of Windows 设置 on the '区域' page, the '区域格式' section now shows the current format as '英语(澳大利亚)'. Below it, the '区域格式数据' section is visible, listing examples such as 'Gregorian Calendar', 'Monday', '31/03/2026', 'Tuesday, 31 March 2026', '5:16 PM', and '5:16:04 PM', along with a blue link '更改数据格式'. The left navigation still highlights '区域', and the page appears positioned lower than before so the format-data examples are in view.
caption.think: The user likely scrolled down within the Settings content pane to review additional regional format details after selecting English (Australia), possibly to access more formatting options.
caption.action: Scroll down in the main Settings page content area.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, revealing more content or controls below the currently visible '区域格式数据' section.
